order_add_date.comment: The date the order was added to the system.

ext_order_key.name: ext_order_key
ext_order_key.comment: The external key for the order.

wms_order_key.name: wms_order_key
wms_order_key.comment: The key for the order within the Warehouse Management System (WMS).

order_type.name: order_type
order_type.comment: The type of order (e.g., inbound, outbound, transfer).

cost_excl_vat.name: cost_excl_vat
cost_excl_vat.comment: The cost of the order excluding VAT (Value Added Tax).

delivery_date.name: delivery_date
delivery_date.comment: The date the delivery was made.

platform.name: platform
platform.comment: The platform used for the transaction.

scn_number.name: scn_number
scn_number.comment: The SCN (Shipment Control Number) associated with the order.

express_company.name: express_company
express_company.comment: The name of the express company handling the shipment.

courier_number.name: courier_number
courier_number.comment: The number associated with the courier.

qty.name: qty
qty.comment: The quantity of items in the order.

destination_province.name: destination_province
destination_province.comment: The province to which the order is being delivered.

destination_city.name: destination_city
destination_city.comment: The city to which the order is being delivered.

chargeable_weight.name: chargeable_weight
chargeable_weight.comment: The weight of the shipment that is chargeable.

msk_system_weight.name: msk_system_weight
msk_system_weight.comment: The weight of the shipment as recorded in the Maersk system.

volumetric_weight.name: volumetric_weight
volumetric_weight.comment: The volumetric weight of the shipment.

signoff_time.name: signoff_time
signoff_time.comment: The time when the shipment was signed off.

additional_weight_kg.name: additional_weight_kg
additional_weight_kg.comment: The additional weight of the shipment in kilograms.

memo.name: memo
memo.comment: Any additional notes or comments regarding the shipment.

wms_receipt_number.name: wms_receipt_number
wms_receipt_number.comment: The receipt number within the Warehouse Management System (WMS).

total_cmbs.name: total_cmbs
total_cmbs.comment: The total number of cubic metres (m³) in the shipment.

total_ctn.name: total_ctn
total_ctn.comment: The total number of cartons in the shipment.

direct_po_product.name: direct_po_product
direct_po_product.comment: Indicates if the product is a direct purchase order (PO) product.

material_and_pop.name: material_and_pop
material_and_pop.comment: Details regarding materials and Point of Purchase (POP).

manual_inbound.name: manual_inbound
manual_inbound.comment: Indicates if the inbound process was done manually.

pullback_return.name: pullback_return
pullback_return.comment: Indicates if the shipment is a pullback return.

transfer.name: transfer
transfer.comment: Indicates if the shipment is a transfer.

indirect_po_product.name: indirect_po_product
indirect_po_product.comment: Indicates if the product is an indirect purchase order (PO) product.

unit_price_excl_vat_mer_ctn.name: unit_price_excl_vat_mer_ctn
unit_price_excl_vat_mer_ctn.comment: The unit price excluding VAT for the merchandise per carton.

unit_price_excl_vat_mer_pcs.name: unit_price_excl_vat_mer_pcs
unit_price_excl_vat_mer_pcs.comment: The unit price excluding VAT for the merchandise per piece.

unit_price_excl_vat_no_mer_cmb.name: unit_price_excl_vat_no_mer_cmb
unit_price_excl_vat_no_mer_cmb.comment: The unit price excluding VAT for the non-merchandise per cubic metre (m³).

wms_product_storage.name: wms_product_storage
wms_product_storage.comment: Indicates if the product is stored in the Warehouse Management System (WMS).

tmall_global_retruns_inbound.name: tmall_global_retruns_inbound
tmall_global_retruns_inbound.comment: Details regarding inbound returns for Tmall Global.

tmall_global_retruns_outbound.name: tmall_global_retruns_outbound
tmall_global_retruns_outbound.comment: Details regarding outbound returns for Tmall Global.

wms_shipped_date.name: wms_shipped_date
wms_shipped_date.comment: The date the shipment was recorded in the Warehouse Management System (WMS).

overtime_type.name: overtime_type
overtime_type.comment: The type of overtime worked (e.g., after-hours, weekend).

overtime_hours.name: overtime_hours
overtime_hours.comment: The number of overtime hours worked.

total_hours.name: total_hours
total_hours.comment: The total number of hours worked.
